column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol provide free Wi-Fi throughout the hotel?
column3: Yes, free unlimited high-speed Wi-Fi is available in all guestrooms and public areas.

column2: Is the front desk at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol open 24 hours a day?
column3: Yes, the hotel operates a staffed reception desk 24 hours a day for arrivals and assistance.

column2: What are the check-in and check-out times at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Check-in begins at 15:00 and check-out is required by 11:00, according to the hotel’s policy.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer on-site parking and what is the daily fee?
column3: The property has a private underground car park on site; the current charge is €15 per day, payable locally.

column2: Is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol a fully non-smoking hotel?
column3: Yes, the hotel is designated non-smoking throughout all rooms and interior public spaces.

column2: Is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol wheelchair-accessible and are adapted rooms available?
column3: The building is disabled-friendly with step-free access, lifts and a number of adapted guest rooms that can be reserved in advance.

column2: How many rooms does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have and what is its official star rating?
column3: The hotel offers 398 guestrooms and suites and is officially rated as a 4-star property.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have multilingual staff at reception?
column3: Yes, reception is staffed by multilingual team members who speak Spanish, English and additional European languages.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol hold any sustainability or eco-certifications?
column3: Information is currently not available. [VERIFY]

column2: What room types are offered at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: The portfolio includes Comfort Rooms, Superior Side Sea View Rooms, Deluxe Sea View Rooms, Deluxe Sea View Triples, Superior Side Sea View Triples and spacious Family Rooms.

column2: Do any rooms at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol feature direct sea views?
column3: Yes, Deluxe Sea View categories and several Family or Superior rooms provide furnished balconies facing the Mediterranean.

column2: Are family rooms available at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol and how many guests can they sleep?
column3: Family Rooms are available and measure around 42 m²; they comfortably accommodate up to four guests in existing bedding.

column2: Do rooms at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol include a private balcony or terrace?
column3: All guest rooms are equipped with a furnished balcony or terrace for outdoor relaxation.

column2: Is air-conditioning provided in all rooms at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, every guest room is individually air-conditioned to ensure year-round climate comfort.

column2: Can guests request hypoallergenic or allergy-free rooms at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: The hotel offers designated allergy-free rooms that can be requested when booking or prior to arrival.

column2: Is daily housekeeping included for stays at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Daily housekeeping, including bed-making, towel refresh and waste removal, is provided without extra charge.

column2: Do rooms at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol come with tea- and coffee-making facilities or a minibar?
column3: Information is currently not available. [VERIFY]

column2: Are baby cots or cribs available at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol, and is there an extra charge?
column3: Baby cots are not supplied by the property; guests should plan to bring their own travel crib. [VERIFY]

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer connecting rooms for larger families or groups?
column3: Information is currently not available. [VERIFY]

column2: What are the buffet breakfast hours at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: The daily international buffet breakfast is served from 07:30 until 10:00 in the main restaurant.

column2: How much does breakfast cost at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol, and is it always included in the rate?
column3: Breakfast costs €15 per adult (children €7.50) when not included; certain packages and promotions already bundle it in the room rate.

column2: Does the main restaurant at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol cater for vegetarian, vegan or gluten-free diets?
column3: The buffet restaurant prepares dedicated vegetarian, vegan and gluten-free options that are clearly labelled each service.

column2: What are the lunch and dinner opening times of the main restaurant at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Lunch is available daily from 13:00–15:30, while dinner is served from 19:00–22:00.

column2: How many bars does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have and where are they located?
column3: Five outlets are in service: a lobby bar, pool bar, snack bar, Bar Circular inside the restaurant and a Sky Bar on the rooftop terrace.

column2: Is there a rooftop Sky Bar at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol, and what are its opening hours?
column3: Yes, the panoramic Sky Bar crowns the rooftop and typically opens between 18:30 and 01:00 during the main season.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer room service, and during which hours is it available?
column3: Yes, room service can be ordered; exact hours vary by season and can be confirmed with reception on the day. [VERIFY]

column2: Are children’s menus or high chairs provided in the restaurant at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Information is currently not available. [VERIFY]

column2: What is the minimum age required to check in at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: The minimum legal age for check-in is 18 years, and photo identification is required.

column2: Are pets allowed at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: No, pets or service animals are not permitted anywhere on the hotel premises.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol allow smoking in any rooms or public areas?
column3: Smoking is prohibited inside all guest rooms and indoor public areas; outdoor designated zones may be provided.

column2: What is the standard cancellation policy for flexible bookings at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Information is currently not available. [VERIFY]

column2: Is early check-in or late check-out possible at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol and are additional fees applied?
column3: Early arrival or late departure can be arranged subject to availability; the hotel may apply a modest additional charge.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol require a security deposit at check-in and what payment methods are accepted?
column3: A refundable deposit may be requested; major credit or debit cards are accepted, while cash is not. [VERIFY]

column2: Can luggage be stored at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol before check-in or after check-out?
column3: Yes, a complimentary luggage storage room is available for early arrivals and departing guests.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol accept group bookings for meetings or events?
column3: Yes, the property has several meeting rooms and welcomes group or event enquiries through its sales team.

column2: How far is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol from Bajondillo Beach and is the walk straightforward?
column3: Bajondillo Beach is about 400 metres away, reached in roughly five minutes via a direct downhill pedestrian route.

column2: How close is Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol to Torremolinos Cercanías train station?
column3: The Cercanías station is approximately 400 metres from the lobby, a gentle five-minute walk.

column2: What is the distance from Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol to Málaga-Costa del Sol Airport?
column3: The airport lies around 8 kilometres north; the drive typically takes 10–15 minutes by car or taxi.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer an airport shuttle service or can transfers be arranged?
column3: The hotel does not run its own airport shuttle, but reception can arrange a private transfer or taxi on request.

column2: Do guests need to reserve on-site parking at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol in advance?
column3: Parking spaces cannot be pre-booked; allocation is on a first-come, first-served basis upon arrival.

column2: Which major attractions are within 2 km of Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Nearby sights include La Carihuela Beach (1.3 km), Aqualand Torremolinos waterpark (1.8 km) and the pedestrian Calle San Miguel shopping street (under 500 m).

column2: Approximately how long does it take to reach Málaga city centre from Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol by car or train?
column3: The C-1 commuter train or the A-7 motorway both reach Málaga city centre in roughly 20 minutes under normal traffic.

column2: Is bicycle rental or secure bike storage available at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Information is currently not available. [VERIFY]

column2: How many swimming pools are there at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol and are they seasonal?
column3: Three pools are offered: a large outdoor pool, a children’s pool and a rooftop pool; the outdoor pools are open seasonally, while the rooftop pool is heated in winter.

column2: Is there a dedicated children’s pool at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, a shallow children’s section adjacent to the main outdoor pool is reserved exclusively for younger guests.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have a rooftop pool with panoramic views?
column3: Yes, the rooftop features a panoramic pool overlooking Torremolinos and the Mediterranean coastline.

column2: Are pool towels and sun loungers provided free of charge at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Complimentary sun loungers are set around each pool, and fresh pool towels are provided without extra cost. [VERIFY]

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol have an on-site gym and what equipment is available?
column3: A fully equipped fitness room is available, featuring cardio machines, free weights and strength-training stations.

column2: Is there a sauna or wellness area at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol?
column3: Yes, guests can relax in the hotel’s indoor sauna, located beside the wellness treatment area.

column2: Are massage or spa treatments available at Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol and how can guests book?
column3: Professional massage and beauty treatments are offered for an additional fee; appointments can be made through reception or the spa desk.

column2: Does Leonardo Hotel Torremolinos Costa del Sol offer a games room with billiards or table tennis?
column3: Yes, an indoor games room provides billiards tables and table tennis for guest entertainment.
